summary: Mixed repository and signal landscape: main agent coding platform releases (Claude Code origins, GitHub Copilot update, Google ADK Go 2.0), new coding model Grok 4.5 (cost challenges to Opus), emphasis on memory infrastructures, MCP tool proliferation, and some maturity in agent security advisories.

candidates.title: Anthropic details Claude Code's origins and evolution
candidates.why_it_matters: Official post shows alpha CLI to product journey, annual run-rate $2.5B, critical for investment signals.

candidates.title: Grok 4.5 launches as cost-efficient coding model
candidates.why_it_matters: 1.5T params, 500K context, lower token cost vs Opus — disrupts coding agent economics.

candidates.title: Claude Sonnet 5 released (Jun 30)
candidates.why_it_matters: New frontier model from Anthropic — key for coding/agent performance at scale.

candidates.title: Google ADK Go 2.0 announced — graph-based workflow, HITL
candidates.why_it_matters: ADK Go evolves multi-agent orchestration with built-in human-in-loop, semantic memory.

candidates.title: GitHub Copilot June 2026 VS Code updates
candidates.why_it_matters: Routine but wide-reaching Copilot improvements for everyday coding workflow.

candidates.title: User reports shift from VS Code/Cursor to Zed + agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Concrete user workflow change: coding agents outgrow traditional IDEs for many.

candidates.title: Coze-MCP bridge to OpenClaw via no-setup skill wrapping
candidates.why_it_matters: User gets MCP tools from Coze workflows without complex config — lowers barrier to MCP adoption.

candidates.title: Filesystem-native agent memory daemon (markdown, consolidation)
candidates.why_it_matters: Practical persistent memory approach — no DB needed, filesystem-based, integrates with many agents.

candidates.title: kb-mcp-lite: lightweight agent-native knowledge base (SQLite+FTS5+vec0+MCP)
candidates.why_it_matters: Provides local, vector-capable knowledge base for agents via MCP — simple integration.

candidates.title: Automox MCP Server 2.2 adds patch policy creation and visual review
candidates.why_it_matters: MCP-enabled security/patch management — concrete infra use case.

candidates.title: GitHub Innersource security advisories generally available
candidates.why_it_matters: SA provides internal advisory distribution, impacts agent security policies.

candidates.title: How Anthropic contains Claude across products — sandbox, tool-scoping
candidates.why_it_matters: Key engineering post: containment patterns (sandboxing, least-privilege, audit) vital for agent safety.

gaps: Missing user_workflow: need two concrete user reports with scenario detail beyond tool shifts (e.g., specific workflow adoption or pain point).
